service.description: Generates MT700 (Issue of a Documentary Credit). Implements FR-SWG-10 lifecycle rules.

return.message: Instrument ${instrumentId} is not an Import LC
Active MT700 already exists for this instrument. Regeneration blocked for dispatched messages.

service.description: Generates MT701 (Issue of a Documentary Credit Continuation). Used for large fields (45B, 46B, 47B).

return.message: Active MT707 already exists. Regeneration blocked for dispatched messages.

service.description: Authorisation to Pay, Accept or Negotiate

actions.script: import trade.SwiftMessageBuilder def builder = new SwiftMessageBuilder(ec).setMessageType("732").setSenderBic("ISSUERXX") .setReceiverBic(pres.presentingBankBic ?: "BENEBANK").setSenderRef(inst.transactionRef) builder.addField("30", ec.user.nowTimestamp.format("yyMMdd")) builder.addField("32B", (pres.claimCurrency ?: "USD") + String.format("%.2f", pres.claimAmount ?: 0).replace(".", ",")) if (pres.senderToReceiverPresentationInfo) builder.addField("72Z", builder.formatValue(pres.senderToReceiverPresentationInfo, 6, 35)) messageContent = builder.build()

import trade.SwiftMessageBuilder def builder = new SwiftMessageBuilder(ec).setMessageType("799").setSenderBic("ISSUERXX") .setReceiverBic("TARGETXX").setSenderRef(inst.transactionRef) builder.addField("79", builder.formatValue(narrative, 35, 50)) messageContent = builder.build()

import trade.SwiftMessageBuilder def builder = new SwiftMessageBuilder(ec).setMessageType("103").setSenderBic("ISSUERXX") .setReceiverBic("BENEBANK").setSenderRef(inst.transactionRef) builder.addField("23B", "CRED") builder.addField("32A", ec.user.nowTimestamp.format("yyMMdd") + (inst.currencyUomId ?: "USD") + String.format("%.2f", inst.amount).replace(".", ",")) builder.addField("50K", builder.formatValue("APPLICANT NAME", 4, 35)) builder.addField("59", builder.formatValue(inst.beneficiaryName, 4, 35)) builder.addField("71A", "OUR") messageContent = builder.build()

import trade.SwiftMessageBuilder def builder = new SwiftMessageBuilder(ec).setMessageType("202").setSenderBic("ISSUERXX") .setReceiverBic("CORRESPBANK").setSenderRef(inst.transactionRef) builder.addField("21", inst.transactionRef) builder.addField("32A", ec.user.nowTimestamp.format("yyMMdd") + (inst.currencyUomId ?: "USD") + String.format("%.2f", inst.amount).replace(".", ",")) builder.addField("58A", "BENEBANK") messageContent = builder.build()
